title: Thliphthisa pseudochlorantha
taxonomy: Thliphthisa pseudochlorantha belongs to the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet family. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Thliphthisa. The genus Thliphthisa is part of the order Celastrales, which comprises a group of flowering plants that are primarily woody and produce small, often fragrant flowers. Thliphthisa pseudochlorantha is native to the tropical regions of the Old World. The classification of Thliphthisa pseudochlorantha is still being researched and may be subject to revision.
